nameMeanings.name: Vogelgesang
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vogelsang
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ingo, Kurt, Bernd, Dieter, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Gunther, Joerg, Otto, Willi.
German: habitational name from any of several places called Vogelsang all over Germany; or a topographic name from a field name. Compare   Birdsong  .

nameMeanings.name: Lernhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Blend of Latin Leo(n)- and Germanic hard ‘strong, hardy’.

en.lifeSummary: Lernhard Vogelgesang was born in 1520. He had at least 3 sons with Catharina. He died in 1594, at the age of 74.
